questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "I saw a dog in the park. ___"
questions.answer: First mention of the dog.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "The dog ran away quickly. ___"
questions.answer: We now know which dog.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Dogs are loyal animals. ___"
questions.answer: General statement about dogs.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "The sun rises in the east. ___"
questions.answer: There is only one.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Stress is bad for your health. ___"
questions.answer: Uncountable noun, general meaning.

questions.prompt: She wants to be _____ engineer when she finishes university.
questions.answer: an — Use 'an' before a vowel sound with a singular countable noun at first mention.

questions.prompt: _____ Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean in the world.
questions.answer: The — Use 'the' when there is only one of something.

questions.prompt: I heard there is _____ new café near the station.
questions.answer: a — Use 'a' when mentioning a singular countable noun for the first time.

questions.prompt: _____ water is essential for all living things.
questions.answer: — No article — 'water' is an uncountable noun used in a general sense.

questions.prompt: _____ teacher who helped me most was Mr. Silva.
questions.answer: The — Use 'the' with a specific singular noun both speaker and listener can identify.

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "She plays a piano every evening after dinner."
questions.answer: Musical instruments take 'the' in general use: 'She plays the piano every evening.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "I need the advice from a professional."
questions.answer: 'Advice' is uncountable and used generally here — no article needed: 'I need advice from a professional.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "The dogs are wonderful pets for families with children."
questions.answer: General statements about plural nouns take no article: 'Dogs are wonderful pets for families with children.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "She is studying to become a doctor at a university in a north."
questions.answer: 'North' used as a region takes 'the': 'in the north.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "The honesty is the best quality a person can have."
questions.answer: Abstract uncountable nouns used generally take no article: 'Honesty is the best quality a person can have.'
The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean.
I saw an elephant at the zoo.
Dogs are loyal animals.
She wants to be an architect.
The teacher talked to us about careers.
